item.title: 4 surprising ways AI is making your life more expensive
item.description: These goods and services are getting more expensive due to spillover from massive tech company investments in artificial intelligence.

item.description: Companies are trying to automate graduates' futures away. No wonder they're furious.

item.title: The most powerful AI stories right now are not chatbots. They are the quiet algorithms reading burnt Roman scrolls, trawling through millions of galaxies, and finding things hidden in data no human team could ever finish searching.
item.description: The artificial intelligence that holds the public's attention writes essays, answers questions and holds a conversation.

item.title: No, Artificial Intelligence Is Not Conscious
